case_title: LIVERWITZ, CLIFFORD et al vs. PHELAN, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-22-1996, OSC TO PLAINTIFFS RE: WHY FAILED TO APPEAR TODAY AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS THE CASE FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO KEEP IN CONTACT WITH THEIR ATTORNEY OF RECORD.
